buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 h-9 px-4 py-2 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 h-9 px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 h-9 px-4 py-2

tables.container: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white
tables.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider

sidebar.container: bg-slate-50 border-r border-slate-200 h-screen sticky top-0 flex flex-col transition-all duration-300
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold border

lgpd_masking.email: Format as u***@client.com. Keep first character, mask next 3-4 with asterisks, keep domain.

rbac.locked_actions: Delete buttons must be visually disabled (opacity-50) with a subtle lock icon (Lucide Lock). Show toast 'Admin rights required' if clicked.

audit_logs.display: Ticket history tab must show chronological events (e.g., 'Status changed to In Progress by Agent X').

animation.sliding_panel: Use Shadcn Sheet component for sliding transitions
animation.toast: Use Sonner for slide-in toast notifications

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='ticket-row-123', data-testid='delete-ticket-button').

image_urls.description: Professional headshot of a smiling woman
Professional headshot of a woman in black shirt
Professional headshot of a man in white shirt
Minimal startup company logo (black on white)
Minimal tech company logo (blue and white)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'recharts' for the Dashboard KPI trends (Ticket volume by priority).
Install 'sonner' for all toast notifications, including LGPD action alerts and RBAC errors.
Import Satoshi Font in your CSS: @import url('https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=satoshi@900,700,500,400&display=swap'); and apply it to body.
Build standard dashboard structure: Sticky Sidebar (collapsible) + Main Content Area.
Data Mocking: Create robust mock objects for Tickets, Customers, and Audit Logs. Implement a maskLGPD() utility specifically for rendering Customer details in Tables.
RBAC: Create a static role context 'Support Specialist (Tier 2)'. Render Delete buttons with opacity-50 and a Lock icon. On click, fire a Sonner error toast.
Use Shadcn 'Sheet' component for the Ticket Queue detail panel.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements to satisfy testing requirements.
